prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Koenigsegg 5.0L V8 (engine code: K1**) with a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (custom billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer, 88mm exducer) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** (set to 2.2 bar absolute boost) for a target of **1,300+ HP on E85** while maintaining the factory 9,250 RPM redline via **CP-Carrillo forged pistons (9.0:1 CR)** and **Pankl titanium connecting rods**

Full **Motec M150 ECU standalone management** with **Bosch Motorsport 8-hole high-flow injectors (2,200cc/min)** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** (AN-10 lines, -12 fittings) to eliminate crankcase pressure under extreme boost, paired with a **Dry Sumps UK 10-stage dry sump system** (12L capacity, -10AN scavenge lines) for oil control at sustained lateral G-forces

Custom **Koenigsegg-developed 100mm titanium intake manifold** (3D-printed via **EOS M290 DMLS**) with **MagnaFlow 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust (Inconel 625 headers, 4-2-1 merge collectors)** and **Akrapovič titanium mufflers (dual 4" outlets)** for optimized scavenging, reducing backpressure by 42% while retaining the factory **Koenigsegg Variable Geometry Turbo (VGT) system**
estetica: Full **Koenigsegg Ghost Package** (matte carbon fiber weave) with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 20" forged wheels (9.5x20 ET25 front, 12.5x20 ET35 rear, titanium lug bolts)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R20 front, 345/30 R20 rear)** for track-focused grip

**Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, 60mm front/80mm rear fender flares)** with **custom Koenigsegg-designed front splitter (3D-printed carbon fiber, 4-stage Gurney flap)** and **rear diffuser (aluminum honeycomb core, 3 active air curtains)** for -180kg downforce at 250 km/h

**Novitec Torado-style LED headlights (DRLs with adaptive laser modules)** and **custom Koenigsegg 'Triplex' rear light cluster (OLED panels, sequential turn signals)** paired with **Aeromotions active rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, carbon fiber, 3-position adjustability: 0°/12°/25°)** for dynamic aero balance
